nasb.text: “This shall be the boundary of the land: on the north side, from the Great Sea by the way of Hethlon, to the entrance of Zedad;

esv.text: “This shall be the boundary of the land: On the north side, from the Great Sea by way of Hethlon to Lebo-hamath, and on to Zedad,

cnv.text: “這地的邊界是：北邊從大海經希特倫的路，到西達達的入口，

ccb.text: “以下是这地方的地界：北界从地中海岸经希特伦到哈马口、西达达、
